responses.en: Hey! I'm Carl's portfolio assistant. Ask me anything about his skills, projects, or experience!
responses.tl: Hoy! Ako ang assistant ni Carl. Tanungin mo ako tungkol sa kanyang skills, projects, o experience!

responses.en: Haha fair enough! I'm just a bot though, so I'm always doing great 😄 Anything I can help you with about Carl's portfolio?
responses.tl: Haha okay lang yan! Bot lang naman ako eh 😄 May gusto ka bang malaman tungkol sa portfolio ni Carl?

responses.en: Carl Stephen Arocha is a Junior Full-Stack Web Developer and a 4th-year BSIT student at Laguna State Polytechnic University, majoring in Web and Mobile Application Development. He's been building web apps since senior high school — a self-described 'vibe coder' open to freelance and entry-level roles! 🙂
responses.tl: Si Carl Stephen Arocha ay isang Junior Full-Stack Web Developer at 4th-year BSIT student sa Laguna State Polytechnic University, major sa Web and Mobile Application Development. Nagbe-build siya ng web apps simula pa noong senior high school — isang 'vibe coder' na bukas sa freelance at entry-level roles! 🙂

responses.en:
Carl's tech stack:
• Languages: JavaScript, TypeScript, PHP, Python, Rust
• Frontend: HTML, CSS, Tailwind, React.js/TS, Next.ts, React Native
• Backend: Node.js, PostgreSQL, Prisma ORM, MongoDB, Firebase, MySQL
• Tools: Vite, VS Code, Postman, Docker, MongoDB Compass
responses.tl:
Ang tech stack ni Carl:
• Languages: JavaScript, TypeScript, PHP, Python, Rust
• Frontend: HTML, CSS, Tailwind, React.js/TS, Next.ts, React Native
• Backend: Node.js, PostgreSQL, Prisma ORM, MongoDB, Firebase, MySQL
• Tools: Vite, VS Code, Postman, Docker, MongoDB Compass

responses.en:
Carl's backend experience:
• Node.js (58%) — server-side JavaScript
• PostgreSQL (73%) — his strongest database
• Prisma ORM (66%) — used in his LMS project
• MongoDB (44%) — used in the inventory system
• Firebase (54%) — real-time features
• MySQL (61%) — relational database
• Socket.IO — real-time features

He's also built role-based access control systems!
responses.tl:
Ang backend experience ni Carl:
• Node.js (58%) — server-side JavaScript
• PostgreSQL (73%) — pinakamalakas niyang database
• Prisma ORM (66%) — ginamit sa LMS project
• MongoDB (44%) — ginamit sa inventory system
• Firebase (54%) — real-time features
• MySQL (61%) — relational database
• Socket.IO — real-time features

Nag-build na rin siya ng role-based access control systems!

tl: ano ibig sabihin ng porsyento sa skills
ano yung mga percentage sa skills

responses.en:
The percentage beside each skill shows how much Carl has learned and how close he is to mastering that technology:
• 90-100% — Mastered, uses daily (e.g. Vite 97%, CSS 93%)
• 70-89% — Very comfortable, solid experience (e.g. JavaScript 80%)
• 50-69% — Working knowledge, still growing (e.g. Node.js 58%)
• Below 50% — Exploring (e.g. Python 30%, Rust 10%)
responses.tl:
Ang porsyento sa tabi ng bawat skill ay nagpapakita kung magkano na ang natutunan ni Carl at kung gaano na siya kalapit sa pag-master ng teknolohiya:
• 90-100% — Na-master na, ginagamit araw-araw (hal. Vite 97%, CSS 93%)
• 70-89% — Komportable, matibay na experience (hal. JavaScript 80%)
• 50-69% — May working knowledge, patuloy natututo (hal. Node.js 58%)
• Wala sa 50% — Nag-eexplore pa (hal. Python 30%, Rust 10%)

en: what does the percentage mean in projects
what does 100 percent mean in projects
what do the percentages in projects mean
tl: ano ibig sabihin ng percentage sa projects
ano yung mga percentage sa projects
yung percentage sa projects anong ibig sabihin
anong ibig sabihin non sa projects

responses.en: The percentage beside each tech in a project shows how much that stack was used throughout the entire project. If React.js is 100% — it means React was used across the whole project from start to finish. It's not a skill rating — it's about how much that technology contributed to the project overall.
responses.tl: Ang porsyento sa tabi ng bawat tech sa isang project ay nagpapakita kung gaano kalaki ang nagamit na stack sa kabuuan ng project. Kung ang React.js ay 100% — ibig sabihin ginamit ang React sa buong project mula simula hanggang katapusan. Hindi ito skill rating — tungkol ito sa kontribusyon ng teknolohiya sa project.

responses.en:
Carl has 4 main projects:
1. EduLink LMS (2025) — Capstone LMS: Next.ts, Prisma ORM, PostgreSQL, Docker
2. Jep Shop Inventory (2025) — Freelance inventory system: MERN stack
3. Healthcare App (2023-2024) — AppCon competition: React.js + Tailwind
4. BAO E-commerce (2024) — Final project: React.js + Tailwind

Want details about any specific project?
responses.tl:
May 4 pangunahing projects si Carl:
1. EduLink LMS (2025) — Capstone LMS: Next.ts, Prisma ORM, PostgreSQL, Docker
2. Jep Shop Inventory (2025) — Freelance inventory system: MERN stack
3. Healthcare App (2023-2024) — AppCon competition: React.js + Tailwind
4. BAO E-commerce (2024) — Final project: React.js + Tailwind

Gusto mo bang malaman ang detalye ng isang specific na project?

responses.en: EduLink is Carl's capstone project — a full-stack LMS where he served as primary programmer. Features: role-based access control, beneficiary performance tracking, Docker deployment. Stack: Next.ts + Prisma ORM + PostgreSQL. Completed, defended, and hardbound! 🎓
responses.tl: Ang EduLink ay ang capstone project ni Carl — isang full-stack LMS kung saan siya ang pangunahing programmer. May role-based access control, beneficiary performance tracking, at Docker deployment. Stack: Next.ts + Prisma ORM + PostgreSQL. Natapos, na-defend, at na-hardbound na! 🎓

responses.en:
Carl has two main work experiences:
• Freelance Web Developer (2024) — Built responsive websites for 7 clients using HTML, CSS, JavaScript. Handled requirements, revisions, and deployment.
• Capstone Full-Stack Developer (2025-2026) — Primary programmer for EduLink LMS: frontend, backend, database, and Docker deployment.
responses.tl:
May dalawang pangunahing work experience si Carl:
• Freelance Web Developer (2024) — Gumawa ng responsive websites para sa 7 kliyente gamit ang HTML, CSS, JavaScript.
• Capstone Full-Stack Developer (2025-2026) — Pangunahing programmer ng EduLink LMS: frontend, backend, database, at Docker deployment.

responses.en: Carl is studying Bachelor of Science in Information Technology (BSIT), major in Web and Mobile Application Development (WMAD) at Laguna State Polytechnic University (2022-2026). Currently in his 4th year! 🎓
responses.tl: Nag-aaral si Carl ng Bachelor of Science in Information Technology (BSIT), major sa Web and Mobile Application Development (WMAD) sa Laguna State Polytechnic University (2022-2026). 4th year na siya ngayon! 🎓
